raw_response.prompt: Create one realistic vertical 9:16 commercial start frame for a one-take product ad. Use reference image 1 as the real product identity lock: preserve the product shape, colors, material, packaging, labels, and visible marks. Place that real product naturally into the requested full scene. Product: Portable LED Lamp. Scene: Cozy bedside/desk nook with a small light-wood table next to a neatly made bed. Evening mood with soft ambient fill; the lamp provides a warm glow that clearly illuminates the surface. Neutral wall with subtle texture; soft-focus edge of a white pillow/duvet to imply bedside use; uncluttered..
